desc:
Minerva is located at Foundation in the southern Savage Divide. Fast travel to Foundation and follow the pathway toward the gate. She can be found on the right side shortly after crossing the bridge.
Minerva rotates weekly among four locations. Check the the Nuke Codes & Minerva button in the tools panel.
Grid F4 (X: 2279, Y: 1313.8)
Submitted By Anonymous Wastelander
